description: A horizontal memorial graphic. Large white serif text on the left reads Wall of Honor beside a blue ribbon with an ICE badge logo, with smaller text reading Customs Patrol Officer Louis David Dixon, End of Watch, Wednesday, April 24, 1974. The center shows a framed grainy portrait of a man with dark hair. The right side shows red roses in front of a U.S. flag.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Customs Patrol Officer Louis David Dixon; End of Watch; Wednesday, April 24, 1974
